message:
Fix operator list in TLS configuration section

- Replace **bold** formatting with links to operator documentation
- Remove `curl` (not a valid operator)
- Replace `email` with correct `save_email` operator
- Fix `from_opensearch` description (uses HTTPS, not TLS server mode)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -188,13 +188,12 @@ details on how to construct cipher lists.
 The following operators and connectors automatically respect the node-level TLS
 configuration:
 
-- **to_opensearch**: Applies min version and ciphers to HTTPS connections
-- **to_splunk**: Applies min version and ciphers to Splunk HEC connections
-- **email**: Applies min version and ciphers to SMTP connections
-- **curl**: Applies min version and ciphers to HTTP/HTTPS/FTP/FTPS connections
-- **load_tcp**: Applies min version and ciphers to TLS server mode
-- **save_tcp**: Applies min version and ciphers to TLS client and server modes
-- **from_opensearch**: Applies min version to TLS server mode
+- [`to_opensearch`](/reference/operators/to_opensearch): Applies min version and ciphers to HTTPS connections
+- [`to_splunk`](/reference/operators/to_splunk): Applies min version and ciphers to Splunk HEC connections
+- [`save_email`](/reference/operators/save_email): Applies min version and ciphers to SMTP connections
+- [`load_tcp`](/reference/operators/load_tcp): Applies min version and ciphers to TLS server mode
+- [`save_tcp`](/reference/operators/save_tcp): Applies min version and ciphers to TLS client and server modes
+- [`from_opensearch`](/reference/operators/from_opensearch): Applies min version and ciphers to HTTPS connections
 
 ## Plugins
